title: Charge case inside screen/forth screen, right zoom in/out
scenario: Quick Start Guide charge case inside screen zoom toggle fails when clicking the right circle button
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app
Swipe or navigate to the fourth screen showing the charge case inside view
Tap the right circle button on the screen
Tap the right circle button again
expected: First tap of the right circle button zooms in and displays new text. Second tap of the right circle button zooms out to the original screen showing the charge case inside.
